features.evidence: 2 and you already have a three more pads on it which is pretty nice and the battery is only 48 watt hours and we have two speakers and for the upgrade first we can add another m

2 and i think asus with some space right here if i were a zeus i will put a longer battery so we have a much better battery life other than that it looks pretty well organized and super easy to access for our upgrades and now let me put back the cover and see how it does all right let s open the lid i remove this guy and turn it on the quality of the lid is pretty well but we can t open it with one hand because the weight i think is so light but with two handed it s very solid and very smooth and let me tap on it let me shift my desk and let me do some typing so the lid is pretty solid it s not wealthy while you re doing other movement in the middle of lower screen we have the asus logo and we also have some reflection in it and on the upper screen we have our 720p camera and also our microphone and the screen itself is 1080p 15

hi guys let s review this project yet very powerful gaming laptop the asus tough a15 all right let s take a look what we have here here we have some menus and user guide and let s check out these boxes we got a power adapter and then we have a power cable and now let s take a look at this bad boy and that looks nice isn t it the material of the lid is plastic but with the magnesium finishing it looks very tough and really fancy and on each side of the lid we have some decorations the tough logo has some reflection in it it s a mirror look so it s very unique and i do wish this were the light bar with the rgb and that will be really cool on the left side we have our audio port the usb type c and two usb one hdmi and our ethernet cable and the power port and on the right side we have one usb and our outtake pin and on the back of the laptop we have two outtake van one on the right side and one on the left side there s not really anything fancy in the front under the laptop as you guys can see we have a lots of intake vents that s very good for the airflow and also each corner we have the non slippery rubber and there s another one in the middle so the laptop is going to be super stable and there are 11 screws that we need to take out if we want to get access to the laptop and that simple right here reminds me the umbrella curve the length of it is only a little bit over 14 and the deep is 10 inch and the thickness is 1 inch and the laptop weights 4 pounds and 10 ounce without the power supply and with the power supply and the cord is 5 pound and 12 ounces if you want to carry this laptop with you for your daily project or school this considered to be a pretty good way and now let s take a look what we have inside this laptop and also what we can do to upgrade let s remove all 11 screws and here s one screw on the left corner when we lose it it s give us a gap to pop open the case you see this little gap then we can insert our two and inside this laptop we have two fans and the heat pipe is not impressive because if you only have three and two are shared with the cpu and gpu and for the cpu we have the amd resin 7 4800 h and for the gpu we got rtx 3050 and for the ram we do have a dual channel 16 gigabyte which is 3200 megahertz and storage wise we have a one single ssd the m

2 and i think asus with some space right here if i were a zeus i will put a longer battery so we have a much better battery life other than that it looks pretty well organized and super easy to access for our upgrades and now let me put back the cover and see how it does all right let s open the lid i remove this guy and turn it on the quality of the lid is pretty well but we can t open it with one hand because the weight i think is so light but with two handed it s very solid and very smooth and let me tap on it let me shift my desk and let me do some typing so the lid is pretty solid it s not wealthy while you re doing other movement in the middle of lower screen we have the asus logo and we also have some reflection in it and on the upper screen we have our 720p camera and also our microphone and the screen itself is 1080p 15 However, my tuf a15 has amd s latest zen 4 8 core processor with nvidia rtx 4070 graphics and a 1080p 144hz screen, but you can get it with lower gpus or even a last gen cpu for less money with the link below

super stable and there are 11 screws that we need to take out if we want to get access to the laptop and that simple right here reminds me the umbrella curve the length of it is only a little bit over 14 and the deep is 10 inch and the thickness is 1 inch and the laptop weights 4 pounds and 10 ounce without the power supply and with the power supply and the cord is 5 pound and 12 ounces if you want
